title: crepis mollis subsp. succisifolia
intro: Crepis mollis subsp. succisifolia is a lesser-known plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is a subspecies of the rough hawk's-beard (Crepis mollis). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Crepis mollis subsp. succisifolia include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. Crepis mollis subsp. succisifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
